A 94

FROG & MONKEY RESTAURANT

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: June 26, 2026

A · 94/100 · safer than 80% of Lake County restaurants we grade

Is FROG & MONKEY RESTAURANT a safe place to eat? Yes — an A grade, 94/100, at its most recent inspection on June 26, 2026. That visit logged 2 intermediate violations.

Its latest inspection on June 26, 2026 cited 2 intermediate violations. Diners give it 4.4 across 1,351 reviews.

Get directions Call (352) 383-1936

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. June 26, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Call Back - Complied

    0 high-priority · 2 intermediate · 0 basic

    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training

  2. April 22, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Call Back - Extension given, pending

    0 high-priority · 2 intermediate · 3 basic

    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation (×2)
    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training

  3. April 21, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Administrative complaint recommended

    8 high-priority · 6 intermediate · 11 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition (×2)
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating) (×2)
    • 06 — Potentially hazardous foods properly thawed
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 12 — Handwashing; employee eating/drinking/smoking practices (×2)
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained
    • 21 — Wiping cloths; clean & soiled linens; laundry
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×5)
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 33 — Garbage and refuse; premises maintained
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation (×2)
    • 41 — Chemicals / toxic substances properly stored & used
    • 51 — Other conditions of sanitary & safe operation
    • 52 — Misrepresentation / misbranding
    • 53 — Food manager certification; employee food-safety training

  4. September 24, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Call Back - Complied

    0 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 2 basic

    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation

  5. September 23, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Warning Issued

    5 high-priority · 1 intermediate · 5 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating)
    • 10 — In-use food dispensing utensils properly stored
    • 21 — Wiping cloths; clean & soiled linens; laundry
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 35 — Insects/rodents/pests; outer openings protected against pests
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation
